title: Thoughts on my future — locking in for the next chapter, Cam Jipp as partner-in-crime
html:
Thoughts on my future — locking in for the next chapter, Cam Jipp as partner-in-crime

Source: 2024-10-30 Apple Note. Written from Shanghai ~6 weeks before departure. The crystallizing post-China game-plan: stop traveling-and-working, start building. First explicit naming of Cam Jipp as the co-founder/co-partner.

TL;DR

  • Self-thesis: "My life is big. My life story is one where I rest my eyes with the sun and love what has transpired."
  • "I will buy my mom a relaxing life by a relaxing river" — recurring mom house by the river aspiration, distilled.
  • The realization: "Not feeling great about working and traveling the wrld is something that you have already done" — the China chapter satisfied the wanderlust budget; locking in for the building chapter is next.
  • "Building something starting work that is the foundation of your legacy is the next step" — pivot from explore to build.
  • The expected route (graduate, get an alright job in some other city, weekend party with people) is named and rejected: "This is the groove that currently exists. We are meant to create our own grooves. Sandboard in our own lane."
  • First explicit "Cam Jipp is my partner in crime" declaration — "He's my boy that I can truly count on. Is moving somewhere with Cam Jipp and building the next move?"
  • Direct setup for the Austin move planning doc 7 months later.

Pattern observed

The decision crystallizes here, even before Yahir has departed China. Cam Jipp gets named as #1, the move-somewhere-and-build plan is articulated, and the explicit rejection of the "good job + party weekends" trajectory is on record. This is the inflection-point note for the Brotein arc and Austin pivot.

Open questions

  • "Is moving somewhere with Cam Jipp and building the next move?" — by Oct 30 he's framing it as a question; by May 2025 it's locked.
  • What did Cam know on this date about his role?
